name: CRITICAL REFUEL REQUEST: [SHIP]
notes: Hi, Another day another beacon.
description:
Hi,

Another day another beacon. There's a [SHIP] with an empty tank at [LOCATION].  The client vessel will pay you at the rate of [FUELRATE] aUEC per SCU of Hydrogen and  [QTFUELRATE] aUEC per SCU of Quantum , and as a United Wayfarers Club contractor, you will also qualify for the UWC service fee listed above upon completion.

I can't lie: it's a nasty place to get stuck and a worse place to get caught by surprise. We've lost good people out there - even the ones who got lucky made it home with pieces missing.

If you decide to take the job, do me a favour and keep everything peeled. If you've got a buddy with time to spare, maybe reach out for a little back-up.

Maybe I'm being paranoid, but that doesn't mean they're not out to get you, as Momma Deloit used to say. 
Actually she never said that - but I'm pretty sure she would if she did this for a living.

Just do the job and get home safe, okay?

Dina Deloit
Dispatch Hub
United Wayfarers Club
"We’ve got your back"

name: URGENT FLEET REFUEL
notes: Hey again, I've got a beacon at [LOCATION] and this one's a big one.
description:
Hey again,

I've got a beacon at [LOCATION] and this one's a big one. An entire little fleet of ships all burned out of fuel at the same time. Impressive coordination and lack of planning at the same time. 

The client vessel will pay you at the rate of [FUELRATE] aUEC per SCU of Hydrogen and  [QTFUELRATE] aUEC per SCU of Quantum , and as a United Wayfarers Club contractor, you will also qualify for the UWC service fee listed above upon completion.

Hopefully since the area they're in is pretty safe, there shouldn't be too much trouble lurking, but these days you never know. Wouldn't hurt to get them back flying again as quick as you're able.

Happy trails,

Dina Deloit
Dispatch Hub
United Wayfarers Club
"We’ve got your back"

name: REFUEL REQUEST: [SHIP]
notes: Hey there, If you're fitted for refueling, you might like this one.
description:
Hey there,

If you're fitted for refueling, you might like this one. 

A beacon has just gone live at [LOCATION], from a client whose [SHIP] is running on empty, so make sure your fuel pods are topped off.

The client vessel will pay you at the rate of [FUELRATE] aUEC per SCU of Hydrogen and  [QTFUELRATE] aUEC per SCU of Quantum , and as a United Wayfarers Club contractor, you will also qualify for the UWC service fee listed above upon completion.

Looks like a zero-drama one and done, but it never hurts to keep your scanners live.
Let me know if you're interested and let's get these good people on their way.

Waiting to hear from you,

Dina Deloit
Dispatch Hub
United Wayfarers Club
"We’ve got your back"

name: URGENT REFUEL REQUEST: [SHIP]
notes: Hey, you! I've got a beacon at [LOCATION].
description:
Hey, you!

I've got a beacon at [LOCATION]. They say their tanks are dry and they're calling for a full refuel. If you're interested, I get the feeling they'll be really pleased to see you.

The client vessel will pay you at the rate of [FUELRATE] aUEC per SCU of Hydrogen and  [QTFUELRATE] aUEC per SCU of Quantum , and as a United Wayfarers Club contractor, you will also qualify for the UWC service fee listed above upon completion.

They're stuck out in an area with a bad reputation, though things have been a bit more quiet recently. Still worth staying alert I'd say, just in case there's still trouble lurking out there. 

Either way, the sooner everyone's able to get flying again - and that includes you - the better.

Happy trails,

Dina Deloit
Dispatch Hub
United Wayfarers Club
"We’ve got your back"

name: UWC'S HIRING REFUELERS
notes: Hey! DD from the United Wayfarers Club here.
description:
Hey!

DD from the United Wayfarers Club here.

The UWC offers repair, rearming and refuelling services across the UEE. It just so happens that we're on the look-out for new affiliates whose ships are fitted for refuelling. If you've got the fuel pods and like it when people are pleased to see you, the UWC might be the club for you.

And if you think it might be, I've got a live beacon you might like.

If you do happen to like it, a word to the wise: make sure your fuel pods are full before you head out.

A Club member has run out of fuel at [LOCATION]. I'm not sure on the details, like how they ended up out there with no Go Juice, but the UWC doesn't like to leave folk hanging.

The client vessel will pay you at the rate of [FUELRATE] aUEC per SCU of Hydrogen and  [QTFUELRATE] aUEC per SCU of Quantum . As a United Wayfarers Club contractor, you will also qualify for the UWC service fee listed above upon completion.

It's a straightforward run. Perfect if you want to get a feel for this kind of job. Get out there, fill up the tanks of their [SHIP] and get them on their way. Do enough runs like this, and the process becomes muscle memory. Until then, there's a journal entry on your mobiGlas called ""Refueling Protocols"" that covers the basics.

There have been no reports of outlaw activity in that sector, but stay alert. I always recommend you aim for a fast turnaround. The sooner you're done, the sooner I can fix you up with another contract. UWC's always looking for new affiliates. 

Looking forward to working with you.

Dina Deloit
Dispatch Hub
United Wayfarers Club
"We’ve got your back"

name: REFUEL REQUEST: [SHIP]
